title: Rewards & Offers
content:
At Tklesson, we believe hard work deserves recognition. Our rewards program is designed to celebrate student dedication and encourage academic growth. Every session brings you closer to valuable perks.

Referral Bonus

When a client refers a friend to Tklesson and the friend signs up for their first paid session, the referrer earns one month of free access to Tklesson Premium. There is no limit to how many friends a client can refer — each successful referral earns another free month.

Session Milestone Bonus

Students who complete 5 tutoring sessions earn one month of free Tklesson Premium access. Every additional set of 5 sessions earns another free month. Tklesson Premium includes access to advanced learning tools, extended messaging with tutors, priority scheduling, and more.

Annual Presentation Competition

Each year, Tklesson hosts a presentation competition open to students who have completed 12 or more sessions in the calendar year.

Prizes awarded December 20th:

PlacePrize
🥇 1st Place$500
🥈 2nd Place$300
🥉 3rd Place$200

Details including the presentation topic, submission guidelines, and judging criteria are announced each fall. Eligible students receive an invitation via email and through their dashboard.

Agent Workflow: Processing a Reward Request

  1. Client contacts support claiming a reward (referral bonus or 5-session milestone).
  2. Verify the client's identity using standard account security checks.
  3. If the client does not yet have a Tklesson Premium account, instruct them to create one before the reward can be applied.
  4. Create a ticket under the Rewards category with the subject line including the client's email and reward type (e.g., "5-Session Milestone — client@email.com").
  5. Set expectations: inform the client that the Rewards department will review the request and respond within 24 hours via email.
  6. Leave the ticket open. The Lead will cross-check eligibility, grant or deny the reward, update the ticket, and email the client directly with the outcome.
  7. Once resolved, the ticket is updated to Resolved status.
